sources.note: Inventory defines research universe only; broker position size is excluded from PEI model sizing.

stock_inventory_context.health_check_reason: PEI 證據與 APEX 門檻不足，先觀察。
stock_inventory_context.recent_trigger_summary: 近一週觸發資料未提供
stock_inventory_context.short_term_scenario: APEX 資料不足：多/空/震盪 25/25/50；缺數值停損門檻
stock_inventory_context.invalidation_condition: PEI：來源未提供，需後續查證。；APEX：缺數值支撐/破位門檻，需補獨立圖表支撐。
stock_inventory_context.data_limitations: 報價：Yahoo Finance via yfinance AXTI，2026-06-24；K線窗 台股/美股 2026-06-18~2026-06-24；PEI conditional risk screen，官方 filings/法說/consensus/估值/流動性模型未逐檔補齊；產業Gate=theme_only、hype=low；缺口：SEC company tickers 未命中或 SEC_USER_AGENT 未設定; 近 7 日公開新聞熱度未命中或未抓取; 缺少明確後續產業 KPI; 缺

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0% pre-trigger; reassess after trigger and evidence review
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: not independently verified in inventory-scope batch
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; model portfolio remains cash for this name until evidence clears
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Open or add only after full PEI specialist workflow confirms thesis, trigger, price context, liquidity, and risk/reward
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: PEI 證據與 APEX 門檻不足，先觀察。
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: PEI：來源未提供，需後續查證。；APEX：缺數值支撐/破位門檻，需補獨立圖表支撐。
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk because inventory-scope model size is 0%
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily price and weekly fundamentals while held in inventory watch universe
